name: Ayam Goreng Asam (Indonesia) Piquant Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into small serving pieces.
2. Crush garlic with salt to a smooth paste and combine with pepper, sugar, coriander, turmeric, and tamarind liquid.
3. Rub the mixture over the chicken pieces and leave for 1 hour, or cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Heat enough oil in a large heavy frying pan to cover the base of the pan.
5. Remove the chicken pieces from the marinade and drain on paper towels to remove excess moisture.
6. Place the pieces into the frying pan and cook over medium heat for 2 minutes on each side, turning with tongs until golden brown.
7. Reduce heat, cover the pan, and continue cooking for 10-12 minutes longer, turning the pieces halfway through.
8. Drain on absorbent paper and serve warm.
